seoTitle: Turners Flat vs Turondale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turners Flat and Turondale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turners Flat vs Turondale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turners Flat and Turondale.
heading: Turners Flat vs Turondale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turners Flat, New South Wales and Turondale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turondale has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Turners Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turners Flat or Turondale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turners Flat has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Turondale scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turners Flat scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Turondale scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turners Flat or Turondale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turondale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
